originalTitle: ServiceNow’s stock falls as a new AI threat overshadows earnings beat
summary: While ServiceNow’s earnings beat proved that its AI momentum is picking up, the launch of OpenAI Presence reignited fears of enterprise software disruption
content: While ServiceNow’s earnings beat proved that its AI momentum is picking up, the launch of OpenAI Presence reignited fears of enterprise software disruption
chineseTitle: 由于新的 AI 威胁掩盖了盈利预期，ServiceNow 股价下跌
chineseSummary: 虽然 ServiceNow 的盈利好转证明其人工智能势头正在增强，但 OpenAI Presence 的推出再次引发了对企业软件颠覆的担忧
chineseContent: 虽然 ServiceNow 的盈利好转证明其人工智能势头正在增强，但 OpenAI Presence 的推出再次引发了对企业软件颠覆的担忧
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
